semantic.role: Vitest test file validating the module boundary of view-related components under src/services/view.
responsibilities: Verify that view-renderer.ts exists in src/services/view.
Verify that arch-diagram-renderer.ts exists in src/services/view.
Verify that view-registry.ts exists in src/services/view.
Verify that view-runtime.ts exists in src/services/view.
Assert that view-renderer.ts does NOT exist in src/infra (boundary enforcement).
outOfScope: Other service boundaries or architecture layers.
invariants: View-related rendering and runtime modules must be located exclusively under src/services/view.
No view-renderer module should exist under src/infra.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Preserve the layered architecture boundary by ensuring view modules are placed in the services layer, not in infra.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No specific recent change identified from commit history; file appears stable as a boundary test.
